_description: Post-scrape patches applied on top of eortologio.gr data. The scraper output is incomplete (missing common nicknames) and contains a few spelling and gender-agreement errors that survive in modern Greek. This file is the single source of truth for those corrections — re-running the scraper without re-applying these patches will regress the catalog.
_keys_used: ioannis (Ιωάννης 7/1) — for the spawned Ιωάννα sibling
